objective: Consolidate overlapping content in src/lib/content/design-portfolio.ts and src/lib/content/projects.ts into a single projects.ts source while preserving DesignPortfolioEntry structure, adding a status field, and supporting unpublished/non-portfolio projects that are available to AI content but excluded from the Portfolio page and image requirements via a boolean flag.

completed_stages.summary: Initialized orchestration manifest with actionable objective and planner handoff.
Produced implementation plan and acceptance criteria for unified projects content.
Implemented unified projects content module, migrated consumers, and removed legacy design-portfolio module.
Added and updated tests to map acceptance criteria coverage and verified check/test commands pass.
Validated implementation against acceptance criteria and ADR references with PASS verdict.
